---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation / Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the use case it enables.
- Who would benefit from this?
- What workflow does it improve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this should work. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples from other projects that might help illustrate the feature.

## Would you be willing to contribute?

- [ ] I can implement this feature
- [ ] I can help test this feature
- [ ] I can provide design/mockups
- [ ] I can help document this feature
